title: asterocephalus neglectus
intro: Asterocephalus neglectus, also known as the 'neglected starflower', is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Asterocephalus neglectus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory conditions, as well as its ability to support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Asterocephalus neglectus typically involve infusions or tinctures made from the plant's flowers and leaves.
